result.reason: The 'white screen' VNC issue is likely caused by an InvalidCastException in Prot_Event_Disconnected when a VncSharpCore.RemoteDesktop object is cast to ProtocolBase, which the proposed fix will resolve.
result.approach: Modify the 'Prot_Event_Disconnected' method in 'mRemoteNG\Connection\ConnectionInitiator.cs' to safely cast the 'sender' object using the 'as' operator and handle 'VncSharpCore.RemoteDesktop' instances specifically.
